title: How to Beat AI in Your Dev Job Search
summary: AWS Developers discusses job search strategies in an AI-driven hiring environment, advocating for networking, personal branding, open-source contributions, and practical projects over mass-applying to roles. The video argues that junior developers remain valuable despite AI screening and that technical jobs will evolve rather than disappear.
writeup: AWS Developers covers job search strategies for developers facing an AI-driven hiring process, arguing that networking, personal branding, open-source contributions, and practical projects beat mass-applying to roles. The video maintains that junior developers stay valuable despite AI screening and that technical jobs will evolve rather than disappear. It references personal branding and the Feynman Principle as part of its approach.
